# CWE-303 — Incorrect Implementation of Authentication Algorithm (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-303-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: compares MACs with ==, enabling timing leaks and wrong semantics.
func VerifyWebhook(c *gin.Context) {
	sig := c.GetHeader("X-Signature")
	body, _ := c.GetRawData()
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte("secret"))
	mac.Write(body)
	expected := mac.Sum(nil)
	if string(expected) == sig {
		c.JSON(200, gin.H{"ok": true})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "bad sig"})
}
